overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a black suit walking through a neon-lit Japanese city street at night, entering a modern commercial building, and exploring the interior lobby and plaza areas. The scene transitions from outdoor urban environment with bright signage to indoor corporate spaces with marble floors and escalators.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with tactile paving

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past various storefronts and neon signs

notable_agents.action: elderly couple walking arm-in-arm toward the camera
man in face mask walking along the street edge

entered.detail: tall building covered in bright colorful neon advertisements and billboards
lit storefront with glass windows and signage
black metal lamp post with overhead lighting
yellow textured guidance strip running along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a neon-lit city street at night, passing by illuminated storefronts and pedestrians. Bright signage covers the buildings to the right while the sidewalk features tactile paving strips. The atmosphere is urban and lively with scattered pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to modern commercial building with exterior stairs

events.description: character begins ascending stone stairs toward building entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the modern glass building and climbing the exterior staircase

notable_agents.action: man in dark suit standing near the building entrance

entered.detail: tall curved building with reflective glass facade and vertical lighting strips
wide staircase with illuminated edges leading up to entrance
overhanging curved roof structure above the main doors

segments.scene_description: The character turns toward a modern glass tower and ascends the exterior stairs. The neon signs of the previous street fade behind as the building's reflective facade and entrance canopy come into view. The space remains open to the night sky but increasingly dominated by the building's architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance with revolving door transition

events.description: character enters the building through the revolving door, transitioning from outdoor to indoor

agents.ego_description: walking through the revolving door into the building lobby

notable_agents.action: man in business suit standing near the interior wall

entered.detail: large glass and metal rotating door entrance
large cylindrical support pillars with metallic finish
vertical red hanging banners with white text

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and enters the building through a revolving door, transitioning from the outdoor night environment into a sheltered lobby space. The lighting shifts from neon outdoor to interior illumination as marble floors and structural columns become visible.

events.description: character steps onto the down escalator and begins descending

agents.ego_description: walking through the lobby and riding the escalator down to the lower level

notable_agents.action: man in suit looking at his phone near the escalator

entered.detail: pair of moving staircases with glass sides and metal handrails
textured stone tiles covering the wall surfaces

segments.scene_description: Inside the building lobby, the character walks past an information desk toward the escalators. The space features marble floors, stone wall paneling, and modern lighting. The character rides the escalator down, revealing a large open plaza below.

scene_state.functional_zone: large circular atrium with upper balconies

events.description: character arrives at the bottom of the escalator into the large circular plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious atrium, observing the surroundings and other people

notable_agents.action: group of businessmen in suits conversing in the plaza

entered.detail: large open space with circular patterned marble flooring
second floor walkway with glass railings overlooking the plaza
row of illuminated beverage and snack machines
large framed posters on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a large circular atrium with high ceilings and an upper-level balcony. The space features patterned marble floors, vending machines along the walls, and scattered groups of people. The atmosphere is that of a corporate or commercial building interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor leading to elevator bank

events.description: character enters a narrow corridor leaving the open plaza behind

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor toward the elevator bank at the end

notable_agents.action: security guard standing against the wall near the elevators

entered.detail: bank of elevator doors with metallic finish and floor indicators
dark stone walls enclosing the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the open atrium and enters a narrow corridor with dark stone walls. The space becomes enclosed as the character approaches a bank of elevators at the corridor's end. A vending machine is visible on the left wall as the character walks toward the elevator doors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit city street into the sterile, enclosed depths of a modern corporate complex. It begins by trailing a character past illuminated storefronts and pedestrians on a lively urban sidewalk before turning toward a glass tower and ascending its exterior stairs. As the character passes through a revolving door, the outdoor neon glow shifts into the bright interior illumination of a lobby featuring marble floors and stone columns. The scene then expands as the character descends an escalator into a vast circular atrium with high ceilings and a balcony, before finally narrowing into a dark stone corridor that leads toward a bank of elevators.
